title: orchis keiskei
intro: Orchis keiskei, also known as the Keiske's orchid or Keiske's orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the genus Orchidaceae. It is native to Japan and is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Orchis keiskei include its ability to improve cardiovascular health, reduce fever, and treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis. In traditional herbal preparations, the rhizomes of Orchis keiskei are often dried and used to make teas, infusions, or decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
